# Refinishing Wizards
> Professional bathtub, tile, and countertop refinishing in Indian Orchard, MA. Restore your surfaces without costly replacement.

## Business
- Name: Refinishing Wizards
- Type: HomeAndConstructionBusiness
- Phone: (413) 563-0487
- Address: 1004 Berkshire Ave., Indian Orchard, MA 01151
- Area Served: Springfield, MA area
- Website: https://yourwebsiteexample.com/refinishingwizard/

## Services
- Bathtub Refinishing
- Tile Refinishing
- Countertop Refinishing
- Shower Refinishing
- Fiberglass Repair

## Frequently Asked Questions
**How much does bathtub refinishing cost?**
Most bathtub refinishing jobs in the Springfield area range from $300 to $600 depending on the size, condition, and material. This is significantly less than full tub replacement which can cost $1,500 to $5,000 or more.

**How long does bathtub refinishing last?**
A professionally refinished bathtub typically lasts 10 to 15 years with proper care. Avoiding abrasive cleaners and using a bath mat will extend the finish life considerably.

**How long does the refinishing process take?**
Most jobs are completed in 4 to 6 hours. We recommend waiting 24 to 48 hours before using the tub to allow the finish to fully cure.

**Do you refinish showers and tile as well?**
Yes. We refinish bathtubs, tile surrounds, shower pans, fiberglass enclosures, and countertops. If it's a surface you want restored, we can likely help.

**What areas do you serve?**
We serve Indian Orchard, Springfield, Chicopee, Holyoke, and the broader Western Massachusetts area. Contact us to confirm service availability at your address.
